revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 諏訪神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=大和市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = [[神奈川県]][[大和市]][[下鶴間]]391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = [[建御名方神]…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 諏訪神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=大和市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = [[神奈川県]][[大和市]][[下鶴間]]391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = [[建御名方神]] |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 9月6日 |地図=Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置=bottom }} '''諏訪神社'''（すわじんじゃ）は、[[神奈川県]][[大和市]][[下鶴間]]にある[[神社]]。
[[式内社]]である'''[[石楯尾神社]]'''（いわたておじんじゃ）の数多くある論社の1つ<ref name="jinjacho">[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁</ref><ref name="yuisho">[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社</ref>。
現在は近隣の[[浅間神社 (大和市)|浅間神社]]の[[兼務社]]になっている。
== 概要 == [[小田急江ノ島線]][[南林間駅]]・[[鶴間駅]]の東方、[[東急]][[田園都市線]][[つきみ野駅]]の南方の[[境川 (東京都・神奈川県)|境川]]付近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳。[[式内社]]である[[石楯尾神社]]の論社であり、そうであれば創建は平安時代以前まで遡るが、諏訪社としては鎌倉時代中期に祀られるようになったとされる<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[大正]]12年（[[1923年]]）の[[関東大震災]]により大被害を被るが、[[昭和]]4年（[[1929年]]）に復旧<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。昭和15年（[[1940年]]）、村社に列格<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[建御名方神]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - 公式サイト * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]]

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine (Yamato)'''|諏訪神社 (大和市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sagami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine (Yamato)'''|諏訪神社 (大和市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sagami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine (Yamato)'''|諏訪神社 (大和市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sagami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine (Yamato)'''|諏訪神社 (大和市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sagami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine (Yamato)'''|諏訪神社 (大和市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sagami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine (Yamato)'''|諏訪神社 (大和市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sagami Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine (Yamato)'''|諏訪神社 (大和市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sagami Province]].

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 諏訪神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=大和市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = [[神奈川県]][[大和市]][[下鶴間]]391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = [[建御名方神]] |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 9月6日 |地図=Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置=bottom }} '''諏訪神社'''（すわじんじゃ）は、[[神奈川県]][[大和市]][[下鶴間]]にある[[神社]]。
[[式内社]]である'''[[石楯尾神社]]'''（いわたておじんじゃ）の数多くある論社の1つ<ref name="jinjacho">[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁</ref><ref name="yuisho">[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社</ref>。
現在は近隣の[[浅間神社 (大和市)|浅間神社]]の[[兼務社]]になっている。
== 概要 == [[小田急江ノ島線]][[南林間駅]]・[[鶴間駅]]の東方、[[東急]][[田園都市線]][[つきみ野駅]]の南方の[[境川 (東京都・神奈川県)|境川]]付近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳。[[式内社]]である[[石楯尾神社]]の論社であり、そうであれば創建は平安時代以前まで遡るが、諏訪社としては鎌倉時代中期に祀られるようになったとされる<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[大正]]12年（[[1923年]]）の[[関東大震災]]により大被害を被るが、[[昭和]]4年（[[1929年]]）に復旧<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。昭和15年（[[1940年]]）、村社に列格<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[建御名方神]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - 公式サイト * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]]

{{translated page|ja|諏訪神社 (大和市)|version=104363447|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 諏訪神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=大和市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = [[神奈川県]][[大和市]][[下鶴間]]391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = [[建御名方神]] |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 9月6日 |地図=Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置=bottom }} '''諏訪神社'''（すわじんじゃ）は、[[神奈川県]][[大和市]][[下鶴間]]にある[[神社]]。
[[式内社]]である'''[[石楯尾神社]]'''（いわたておじんじゃ）の数多くある論社の1つ<ref name="jinjacho">[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁</ref><ref name="yuisho">[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社</ref>。
現在は近隣の[[浅間神社 (大和市)|浅間神社]]の[[兼務社]]になっている。
== 概要 == [[小田急江ノ島線]][[南林間駅]]・[[鶴間駅]]の東方、[[東急]][[田園都市線]][[つきみ野駅]]の南方の[[境川 (東京都・神奈川県)|境川]]付近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳。[[式内社]]である[[石楯尾神社]]の論社であり、そうであれば創建は平安時代以前まで遡るが、諏訪社としては鎌倉時代中期に祀られるようになったとされる<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[大正]]12年（[[1923年]]）の[[関東大震災]]により大被害を被るが、[[昭和]]4年（[[1929年]]）に復旧<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。昭和15年（[[1940年]]）、村社に列格<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[建御名方神]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - 公式サイト * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]]
==End Japanese==

== 概要 == [[小田急江ノ島線]][[南林間駅]]・[[鶴間駅]]の東方、[[東急]][[田園都市線]][[つきみ野駅]]の南方の[[境川 (東京都・神奈川県)|境川]]付近に鎮座している。
創建は不詳。[[式内社]]である[[石楯尾神社]]の論社であり、そうであれば創建は平安時代以前まで遡るが、諏訪社としては鎌倉時代中期に祀られるようになったとされる<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[大正]]12年（[[1923年]]）の[[関東大震災]]により大被害を被るが、[[昭和]]4年（[[1929年]]）に復旧<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。昭和15年（[[1940年]]）、村社に列格<ref name="jinjacho"/><ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[建御名方神]]
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - 公式サイト * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|諏訪神社|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|神奈川県|Q127513}}{{jalink|大和市|Q386697}}{{jalink|下鶴間|Q11361525}}391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{jalink|建御名方神}} |社格 = 旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 9月6日 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|神社鳥居]] '''諏訪神社'''（すわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|神奈川県|Q127513}}{{jalink|大和市|Q386697}}{{jalink|下鶴間|Q11361525}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''{{jalink|石楯尾神社|Q11586614}}'''（いわたておじんじゃ）の数多くある論社の1つ[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社。 現在は近隣の{{jalink|浅間神社 (大和市)|Q134926730|浅間神社}}の{{jalink|兼務社}}になっている。 === 概要 === {{jalink|小田急江ノ島線|Q1063924}}{{jalink|南林間駅|Q999127}}・{{jalink|鶴間駅|Q4506209}}の東方、{{jalink|東急|Q1332242}}{{jalink|田園都市線}}{{jalink|つきみ野駅|Q7850073}}の南方の{{jalink|境川 (東京都・神奈川県)|Q6375268|境川}}付近に鎮座している。 創建は不詳。{{jalink|式内社}}である{{jalink|石楯尾神社|Q11586614}}の論社であり、そうであれば創建は平安時代以前まで遡るが、諏訪社としては鎌倉時代中期に祀られるようになったとされる。 {{jalink|大正|Q329174}}12年（{{jalink|1923年|Q2169}}）の{{jalink|関東大震災|Q3742341}}により大被害を被るが、{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}4年（{{jalink|1929年|Q18792}}）に復旧。昭和15年（{{jalink|1940年|Q18633}}）、村社に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建御名方神}} {{-}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - 公式サイト * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|諏訪神社|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|神奈川県|Q127513}}{{jalink|大和市|Q386697}}{{jalink|下鶴間|Q11361525}}391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{jalink|建御名方神}} |社格 = 旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 9月6日 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|神社鳥居]] '''諏訪神社'''（すわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|神奈川県|Q127513}}{{jalink|大和市|Q386697}}{{jalink|下鶴間|Q11361525}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''{{jalink|石楯尾神社|Q11586614}}'''（いわたておじんじゃ）の数多くある論社の1つ[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社。 現在は近隣の{{jalink|浅間神社 (大和市)|Q134926730|浅間神社}}の{{jalink|兼務社}}になっている。 === 概要 === {{jalink|小田急江ノ島線|Q1063924}}{{jalink|南林間駅|Q999127}}・{{jalink|鶴間駅|Q4506209}}の東方、{{jalink|東急|Q1332242}}{{jalink|田園都市線}}{{jalink|つきみ野駅|Q7850073}}の南方の{{jalink|境川 (東京都・神奈川県)|Q6375268|境川}}付近に鎮座している。 創建は不詳。{{jalink|式内社}}である{{jalink|石楯尾神社|Q11586614}}の論社であり、そうであれば創建は平安時代以前まで遡るが、諏訪社としては鎌倉時代中期に祀られるようになったとされる。 {{jalink|大正|Q329174}}12年（{{jalink|1923年|Q2169}}）の{{jalink|関東大震災|Q3742341}}により大被害を被るが、{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}4年（{{jalink|1929年|Q18792}}）に復旧。昭和15年（{{jalink|1940年|Q18633}}）、村社に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建御名方神}} {{-}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - 公式サイト * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|諏訪神社|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|神奈川県|Q127513}}{{jalink|大和市|Q386697}}{{jalink|下鶴間|Q11361525}}391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{jalink|建御名方神}} |社格 = 旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、{{jalink|式内社}}論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 9月6日 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|神社鳥居]] '''諏訪神社'''（すわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|神奈川県|Q127513}}{{jalink|大和市|Q386697}}{{jalink|下鶴間|Q11361525}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''{{jalink|石楯尾神社|Q11586614}}'''（いわたておじんじゃ）の数多くある論社の1つ[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社。 現在は近隣の{{jalink|浅間神社 (大和市)|Q134926730|浅間神社}}の{{jalink|兼務社}}になっている。 === 概要 === {{jalink|小田急江ノ島線|Q1063924}}{{jalink|南林間駅|Q999127}}・{{jalink|鶴間駅|Q4506209}}の東方、{{jalink|東急|Q1332242}}{{jalink|田園都市線}}{{jalink|つきみ野駅|Q7850073}}の南方の{{jalink|境川 (東京都・神奈川県)|Q6375268|境川}}付近に鎮座している。 創建は不詳。{{jalink|式内社}}である{{jalink|石楯尾神社|Q11586614}}の論社であり、そうであれば創建は平安時代以前まで遡るが、諏訪社としては鎌倉時代中期に祀られるようになったとされる。 {{jalink|大正|Q329174}}12年（{{jalink|1923年|Q2169}}）の{{jalink|関東大震災|Q3742341}}により大被害を被るが、{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}4年（{{jalink|1929年|Q18792}}）に復旧。昭和15年（{{jalink|1940年|Q18633}}）、村社に列格。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|建御名方神}} {{-}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - 公式サイト * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁 {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|Suwa Shrine|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513}}{{jalink|Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697}}{{jalink|Shimotsuruma|Q11361525}} 391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{jalink|Takeminakata|Q402376|Takeminakata-no-Kami}} |社格 = former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = September 6 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|Shrine torii]] '''Suwa Shrine''' (すわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Shimotsuruma|Q11361525}}, {{jalink|Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697}}, {{jalink|Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{jalink|Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{jalink|Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|Sengen Shrine}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{jalink|Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127}} and {{jalink|Tsuruma Station|Q4506209}} on the {{jalink|Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924}}, and south of {{jalink|Tsukimino Station|Q7850073}} on the {{jalink|Tokyu|Q1332242}} {{jalink|Den-en-toshi Line}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{jalink|Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{jalink|Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341}} of {{jalink|1923|Q2169}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{jalink|1929|Q18792}} (Shōwa 4). In {{jalink|1940|Q18633}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Takeminakata|Q402376|Takeminakata-no-Kami}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

It is located in [[Sagami Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province|ja|相模国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11582137}} ** Series ordinal: 13 ** P155: {{ill|Q11516854|lt=Q11516854|WD=Q11516854}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039725|lt=Q135039725|WD=Q135039725}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Sagami Province|lt=Sagami Province|ckb|پارێزگای ساگامی|cs|Provincie Sagami|de|Provinz Sagami|en|Sagami Province|es|Provincia de Sagami|fa|ولایت ساگامی|fr|Province de Sagami|gl|Provincia de Sagami|id|Provinsi Sagami|it|Sagami (provincia)|ja|相模国|ko|사가미국|lt|Sagamio žemė|nl|Sagami (provincie)|pt|Província de Sagami|ru|Сагами (провинция)|simple|Sagami Province|sk|Sagami (provincia)|sr|Провинција Сагами|tr|Sagami (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Саґамі|zh_min_nan|Sagami-kok|zh_yue|相模國|zh|相模國|WD=Q1053732}} * {{ill|Q1202776|lt=Q1202776|WD=Q1202776}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.497521|139.462447}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181688 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|lt=Q135159299|WD=Q135159299}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|WD=Q134917284}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|lt=Q3029647|WD=Q3029647}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Ihatatewono Shrine|lt=Ihatatewono Shrine|WD=Q135039724}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '神奈川県相模原市緑区名倉', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|Suwa Shrine|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513}}{{jalink|Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697}}{{jalink|Shimotsuruma|Q11361525}} 391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{jalink|Takeminakata|Q402376|Takeminakata-no-Kami}} |社格 = former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = September 6 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|Shrine torii]] '''Suwa Shrine''' (すわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Shimotsuruma|Q11361525}}, {{jalink|Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697}}, {{jalink|Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{jalink|Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{jalink|Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|Sengen Shrine}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{jalink|Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127}} and {{jalink|Tsuruma Station|Q4506209}} on the {{jalink|Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924}}, and south of {{jalink|Tsukimino Station|Q7850073}} on the {{jalink|Tokyu|Q1332242}} {{jalink|Den-en-toshi Line}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{jalink|Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{jalink|Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341}} of {{jalink|1923|Q2169}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{jalink|1929|Q18792}} (Shōwa 4). In {{jalink|1940|Q18633}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Takeminakata|Q402376|Takeminakata-no-Kami}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

Shrine|lt=Ihatatewono Shrine|WD=Q135039724}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '神奈川県相模原市緑区名倉', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|Suwa Shrine|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513}}{{jalink|Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697}}{{jalink|Shimotsuruma|Q11361525}} 391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{jalink|Takeminakata|Q402376|Takeminakata-no-Kami}} |社格 = former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = September 6 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|Shrine torii]] '''Suwa Shrine''' (すわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Shimotsuruma|Q11361525}}, {{jalink|Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697}}, {{jalink|Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{jalink|Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{jalink|Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|Sengen Shrine}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{jalink|Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127}} and {{jalink|Tsuruma Station|Q4506209}} on the {{jalink|Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924}}, and south of {{jalink|Tsukimino Station|Q7850073}} on the {{jalink|Tokyu|Q1332242}} {{jalink|Den-en-toshi Line}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{jalink|Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{jalink|Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341}} of {{jalink|1923|Q2169}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{jalink|1929|Q18792}} (Shōwa 4). In {{jalink|1940|Q18633}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Takeminakata|Q402376|Takeminakata-no-Kami}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]][[Category:qq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|Suwa Shrine|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513}}{{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697}}{{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525}} 391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami}} |社格 = former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = September 6 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|Shrine torii]] '''Suwa Shrine''' (すわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525}}, {{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697}}, {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{ill|lt=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|WD=Q134926730|lt=Sengen Shrine}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{ill|lt=Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127|WD=Q999127}} and {{ill|lt=Tsuruma Station|Q4506209|WD=Q4506209}} on the {{ill|lt=Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924|WD=Q1063924}}, and south of {{ill|lt=Tsukimino Station|Q7850073|WD=Q7850073}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokyu|Q1332242|WD=Q1332242}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Den-en-toshi Line|UNKNOWN}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{ill|lt=Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341|WD=Q3742341}} of {{ill|lt=1923|Q2169|WD=Q2169}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{ill|lt=1929|Q18792|WD=Q18792}} (Shōwa 4). In {{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|WD=Q18633}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is located in [[Sagami Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Sagami|de|Provinz Sagami|en|Sagami Province|es|Provincia de Sagami|fa|ولایت ساگامی|fr|Province de Sagami|gl|Provincia de Sagami|id|Provinsi Sagami|it|Sagami (provincia)|ja|相模国|ko|사가미국|lt|Sagamio Shrine|lt=Ihatatewono Shrine|WD=Q135039724}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '神奈川県相模原市緑区名倉', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:諏訪神社 (大和市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134928967}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|Suwa Shrine|すわじんじゃ}} |画像= [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato city.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513}}{{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697}}{{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525}} 391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami}} |社格 = former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = September 6 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|Shrine torii]] '''Suwa Shrine''' (すわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525}}, {{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697}}, {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{ill|lt=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|WD=Q134926730|lt=Sengen Shrine}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{ill|lt=Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127|WD=Q999127}} and {{ill|lt=Tsuruma Station|Q4506209|WD=Q4506209}} on the {{ill|lt=Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924|WD=Q1063924}}, and south of {{ill|lt=Tsukimino Station|Q7850073|WD=Q7850073}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokyu|Q1332242|WD=Q1332242}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Den-en-toshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{ill|lt=Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341|WD=Q3742341}} of {{ill|lt=1923|Q2169|WD=Q2169}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{ill|lt=1929|Q18792|WD=Q18792}} (Shōwa 4). In {{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|WD=Q18633}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It suffered heavy damage in the {{ill|lt=Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341|WD=Q3742341|1=aftermath of 1923 Great Kantō earthquake}} of {{ill|lt=1923|Q2169|WD=Q2169|1=1923}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{ill|lt=1929|Q18792|WD=Q18792|1=1929}} (Shōwa 4). In {{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|WD=Q18633|1=1940}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office {{DEFAULTSORT:すわしんしや やまとし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{ill|lt=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|WD=Q134926730|lt=Sengen Shrine|1=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{ill|lt=Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127|WD=Q999127|1=Minami-Rinkan Station}} and {{ill|lt=Tsuruma Station|Q4506209|WD=Q4506209|1=Tsuruma Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924|WD=Q1063924|1=Odakyū Enoshima Line}}, and south of {{ill|lt=Tsukimino Station|Q7850073|WD=Q7850073|1=Tsukimino Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokyu|Q1332242|WD=Q1332242|1=Tokyu Corporation}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Den-en-toshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614|1=Ihatate-no-Jinja}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{ill|lt=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|WD=Q134926730|lt=Sengen Shrine|1=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{ill|lt=Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127|WD=Q999127|1=Minami-Rinkan Station}} and {{ill|lt=Tsuruma Station|Q4506209|WD=Q4506209|1=Tsuruma Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924|WD=Q1063924|1=Odakyū Enoshima Line}}, and south of {{ill|lt=Tsukimino Station|Q7850073|WD=Q7850073|1=Tsukimino Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokyu|Q1332242|WD=Q1332242|1=Tokyu Corporation}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Den-en-toshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614|1=Ihatate-no-Jinja}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{ill|lt=Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341|WD=Q3742341|1=aftermath of 1923 Great Kantō earthquake}} of {{ill|lt=1923|Q2169|WD=Q2169|1=1923}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{ill|lt=1929|Q18792|WD=Q18792|1=1929}} (Shōwa 4). In {{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|WD=Q18633|1=1940}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:神奈川県の旧村社]] [[Category:相模国の式内社]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]][[Category:qq]]

In {{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|WD=Q18633|1=1940}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:神奈川県の神社]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]][[Category:qq]]

Worship hall {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697|1=Yamato, Kanagawa}}{{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525|1=Shimo-tsuruma}} 391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} |社格 = former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = September 6 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|Shrine torii]] '''Suwa Shrine''' (すわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525|1=Shimo-tsuruma}}, {{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697|1=Yamato, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614|1=Ihatate-no-Jinja}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{ill|lt=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|WD=Q134926730|lt=Sengen Shrine|1=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{ill|lt=Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127|WD=Q999127|1=Minami-Rinkan Station}} and {{ill|lt=Tsuruma Station|Q4506209|WD=Q4506209|1=Tsuruma Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924|WD=Q1063924|1=Odakyū Enoshima Line}}, and south of {{ill|lt=Tsukimino Station|Q7850073|WD=Q7850073|1=Tsukimino Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokyu|Q1332242|WD=Q1332242|1=Tokyu Corporation}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Den-en-toshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614|1=Ihatate-no-Jinja}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{ill|lt=Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341|WD=Q3742341|1=aftermath of 1923 Great Kantō earthquake}} of {{ill|lt=1923|Q2169|WD=Q2169|1=1923}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{ill|lt=1929|Q18792|WD=Q18792|1=1929}} (Shōwa 4). In {{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|WD=Q18633|1=1940}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:諏訪神社]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]][[Category:qq]]

Worship hall {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|29|51.5|N|139|27|44.6|E}}}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697|1=Yamato, Kanagawa}}{{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525|1=Shimo-tsuruma}} 391 |緯度度=35|緯度分=29|緯度秒=51.5|N(北緯)及びS(南緯)=N |経度度=139|経度分=27|経度秒=44.6|E(東経)及びW(西経)=E |祭神 = {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} |社格 = former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = September 6 |地図 = Japan Kanagawa |ラベル位置 = bottom }} [[File:Suwa Shrine in Yamato at torii gate.jpg|thumb|Shrine torii]] '''Suwa Shrine''' (すわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Shimotsuruma|Q11361525|WD=Q11361525|1=Shimo-tsuruma}}, {{ill|lt=Yamato, Kanagawa|Q386697|WD=Q386697|1=Yamato, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|WD=Q127513|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. It is one of the many candidate shrines for '''{{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614|1=Ihatate-no-Jinja}}''' (いわたておじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - 神奈川県神社庁[http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/yuisho/yuisho.html 由緒] - 諏訪神社. Today it is an affiliated shrine of nearby {{ill|lt=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)|Q134926730|WD=Q134926730|lt=Sengen Shrine|1=Sengen Shrine (Yamato)}}. === Overview === It is located near the Sakaigawa River, east of {{ill|lt=Minami-Rinkan Station|Q999127|WD=Q999127|1=Minami-Rinkan Station}} and {{ill|lt=Tsuruma Station|Q4506209|WD=Q4506209|1=Tsuruma Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Odakyu Enoshima Line|Q1063924|WD=Q1063924|1=Odakyū Enoshima Line}}, and south of {{ill|lt=Tsukimino Station|Q7850073|WD=Q7850073|1=Tsukimino Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokyu|Q1332242|WD=Q1332242|1=Tokyu Corporation}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Den-en-toshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}}. Its founding is unknown. It is a candidate shrine for {{ill|lt=Iwatateo Shrine|Q11586614|WD=Q11586614|1=Ihatate-no-Jinja}}, and if that identification is correct it dates back to before the Heian period; as a Suwa shrine, however, it is said to have been enshrined from the mid-Kamakura period. It suffered heavy damage in the {{ill|lt=Great Kantō earthquake|Q3742341|WD=Q3742341|1=aftermath of 1923 Great Kantō earthquake}} of {{ill|lt=1923|Q2169|WD=Q2169|1=1923}} (Taishō 12), but was restored in {{ill|lt=1929|Q18792|WD=Q18792|1=1929}} (Shōwa 4). In {{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|WD=Q18633|1=1940}} (Shōwa 15), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|Q402376|WD=Q402376|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} {{-}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://simoturumasuwajinja.web.fc2.com/ 諏訪神社] - official site * [https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/shrine/1207079-000/ 諏訪神社] - Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Office == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Suwa Shrine (Yamato)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:Suwa shrines]] [[Category:大和市の歴史]] [[Category:大和市の建築物]]
